summary: Committed harper-app/roles.yaml as the app_user source of truth, enabled the Harper roles extension, added a deploy-time live drift check, and verified current non-admin app_user writes are denied.

criteria.criterion: Role map is committed at the component root
criteria.evidence: harper-app/roles.yaml plus tests/harper_role_map.test.ts assert read-only grants for every exported public table and no grants for private user tables

criteria.criterion: A non-admin app_user cannot write an @export table
CI fails when deployed role drifts from committed map
criteria.evidence: deploy.yml runs bun run check:roles after deploy; local pre-deploy run failed with missing live table grant: BranchCoverage
harper-app/config.yaml keeps graphqlSchema, rest, jsResource, fastifyRoutes, static, and roles; unit test asserts all keys

verification.runtime_probe: bun run smoke:rbac -> PASS; bun run check:roles -> expected pre-deploy drift missing BranchCoverage
